# Image Generate
**ID:** image-generate  
**Type:** Atomic  
**Level:** IV  
**Rarity:** Uncommon  
**Status:** Provisional

---

## Description
Creates photorealistic or stylized images from text prompts using diffusion-based or autoregressive generative models.
